title: More Effects in Potions
description: Add more potions with vanilla effects that can't be crafted
body:
**With Fabric versions: Require Fabric API**

This mod will add potions/ splash potions/ tipped arrows of:
- Levitation

![Levitation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f3f269bed8bcbb133615963b976586199fced55.png)
- Mining Fatigue

![Mining Fatigue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f47b0720648e97b4f19dd636c66f89e25dfb76d.png)
- Wither

![Wither](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6baf5a34080e49d2ca7ddab8114d7566e3d9118.png)
- Haste

![Haste](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bac120ea6c5c5d4365d47a4ea0d82bdc3265e886.png)
- Resistance

![Resistance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d11d7b076d8f47f08d9ba90652770cf246f44fd8.png)
- Blindness

![Blindness](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9006c150df5169f8473efacbd899677ee37dfbb8.png)
- Health Boost

![Health Boost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2b228968b6b5ff8126aae26bb08945c938969ac.png)
- Hero of the Village (30s)

![Hero of the Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d92b1a54f63209162ac75fbbac158989379c83c.png)
- Conduit Power

**Use Heart of the Sea + Akward Potion (1.21.11+ / Neoforge 1.21.1 / Neoforge 1.21.8)**

<details>
<summary>Old Recipe</summary>
  
![Conduit Power](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6bd660dc2c90d67b3a58a39472c0a7adc737e747.png)

</details>


- Dolphin's Grace

**Use Nautilus Shell + Akward Potion (1.21.11+ / Neoforge 1.21.1 / Neoforge 1.21.8)**


<details>
<summary>Old Recipe</summary>

![Dolphin's Grace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75a2feb3db616856f39cf0ca5b3b5cb534b0413d.png)

</details>


- Bad Luck

![Bad Luck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a56554f1b78093a3cf38c06668b432da562196d.png)
- Luck (can be crafted in surival mod)

![Luck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7712409824968e593bc40a432396ff9f1b0b846d.png)

Recipe Note: 
- **Splash Potions and Tipped Arrow use Potions + Gun powder/Dragon's breath like vanilla**
- **All potions above must be brewed with akward potion (except Bad Luck - using Luck Potion + Fermented Spider Eye)**
